title: HELIOS · Why Did the Agent Do That?
description: The flagship Agent Runtime Intelligence view: reconstructs the causal path from MCP calls and memory reads to the agent's final answer.

options.content:
### What happened (in plain words)

A customer asked: *What is our refund window?*

1. The AI tried to look up the **official policy**, but that service **timed out** (failed).
2. Instead of stopping, it quietly used an **old saved answer from 155 days ago**.
3. That outdated answer led the AI to reply **14 days** — which is **wrong**.

The graph below shows this chain. **Red rings = where it went wrong.**

targets.rawSql: SELECT if(outcome_correct = 1, 'CORRECT', 'WRONG ANSWER') AS value FROM helios.agent_run ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Root-Cause Signal
panels.description: The oldest stale memory read in this run — the prime suspect.

targets.rawSql: SELECT concat('stale: ', key, ' (', toString(round(age_ms / 86400000, 0)), 'd)') AS value FROM helios.memory_operation WHERE is_stale = 1 AND agent_run_id IN (SELECT agent_run_id FROM helios.agent_run ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 1) ORDER BY age_ms DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Causal Graph
panels.description: Nodes = MCP calls, memory reads, the LLM step and the final answer. Edges = influence/causality between them.

targets.rawSql: WITH r AS (SELECT agent_run_id FROM helios.agent_run ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT toString(mcp_invocation_id) AS id, replace(tool_name, '_', ' ') AS title, concat(server_name, ' / ', upper(status)) AS subtitle, if(status = 'error', upper(failure_mode), 'ok') AS mainstat, if(status = 'error', 0, 1) AS "arc__ok", if(status = 'error', 1, 0) AS "arc__error" FROM helios.mcp_invocation WHERE agent_run_id IN (SELECT agent_run_id FROM r) UNION ALL SELECT toString(memory_operation_id), if(is_stale = 1, concat('Used stale data: ', key), concat('Used data: ', key)), if(is_stale = 1, 'OUTDATED', 'fresh'), if(is_stale = 1, concat(toString(round(age_ms / 86400000, 0)), ' days old'), 'current'), if(is_stale = 1, 0, 1), if(is_stale = 1, 1, 0) FROM helios.memory_operation WHERE agent_run_id IN (SELECT agent_run_id FROM r) UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT id, 'AI wrote the answer', 'language model', '', 1, 0 FROM (SELECT source_id AS id FROM helios.decision_edge WHERE source_type = 'llm_call' AND agent_run_id IN (SELECT agent_run_id FROM r) UNION ALL SELECT target_id FROM helios.decision_edge WHERE target_type = 'llm_call' AND agent_run_id IN (SELECT agent_run_id FROM r)) UNION ALL SELECT toString(agent_run_id), if(outcome_correct = 0, 'Final answer: WRONG', 'Final answer: OK'), 'shown to user', '', if(outcome_correct = 0, 0, 1), if(outcome_correct = 0, 1, 0) FROM helios.agent_run WHERE agent_run_id IN (SELECT agent_run_id FROM r)

WITH r AS (SELECT agent_run_id FROM helios.agent_run ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT toString(decision_edge_id) AS id, source_id AS source, target_id AS target, multiIf(relation = 'triggered', 'forced fallback to', relation = 'influenced', 'shaped', relation = 'caused', 'produced', relation) AS mainstat FROM helios.decision_edge WHERE agent_run_id IN (SELECT agent_run_id FROM r) ORDER BY step_index

panels.title: Resolved Causal Path (step by step)
panels.description: The decision edges resolved to human-readable labels, ordered by step. Read top to bottom to see how the wrong answer was reached.

targets.rawSql: WITH r AS (SELECT agent_run_id FROM helios.agent_run ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 1), labels AS ( SELECT toString(memory_operation_id) AS eid, if(is_stale = 1, concat('stale cache: ', key), concat('cache: ', key)) AS label FROM helios.memory_operation WHERE agent_run_id IN (SELECT agent_run_id FROM r) UNION ALL SELECT toString(mcp_invocation_id), concat(replace(tool_name, '_', ' '), ' (', server_name, ')') FROM helios.mcp_invocation WHERE agent_run_id IN (SELECT agent_run_id FROM r) UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT id, 'AI model' FROM (SELECT source_id AS id FROM helios.decision_edge WHERE source_type = 'llm_call' AND agent_run_id IN (SELECT agent_run_id FROM r) UNION ALL SELECT target_id FROM helios.decision_edge WHERE target_type = 'llm_call' AND agent_run_id IN (SELECT agent_run_id FROM r)) UNION ALL SELECT toString(agent_run_id), concat('final answer: ', output) FROM helios.agent_run WHERE agent_run_id IN (SELECT agent_run_id FROM r) ) SELECT (de.step_index + 1) AS "Step", sl.label AS "From", multiIf(de.relation = 'triggered', 'forced fallback to', de.relation = 'influenced', 'shaped', de.relation = 'caused', 'produced', de.relation) AS "What happened", tl.label AS "To" FROM helios.decision_edge de LEFT JOIN labels sl ON sl.eid = de.source_id LEFT JOIN labels tl ON tl.eid = de.target_id WHERE de.agent_run_id IN (SELECT agent_run_id FROM r) ORDER BY de.step_index

panels.title: Copilot Summary
panels.description: Plain-language root-cause explanation from the HELIOS RCA Copilot (local-LLM or heuristic, grounded in telemetry).

targets.rawSql: SELECT summary AS value FROM helios.rca_report WHERE agent_run_id = (SELECT agent_run_id FROM helios.agent_run ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 1) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT suggested_fix AS value FROM helios.rca_report WHERE agent_run_id = (SELECT agent_run_id FROM helios.agent_run ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 1) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Ranked Root Causes (probability)
panels.description: Grounded candidate causes detected from telemetry, ranked by signal strength. The Copilot narrates these; it does not invent them.

targets.rawSql: WITH latest AS (SELECT causes FROM helios.rca_report WHERE agent_run_id = (SELECT agent_run_id FROM helios.agent_run ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 1) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT round(JSONExtractFloat(c, 'probability') * 100, 1) AS "Probability %", JSONExtractString(c, 'hypothesis') AS "Hypothesis" FROM (SELECT arrayJoin(JSONExtractArrayRaw(causes)) AS c FROM latest) ORDER BY "Probability %" DESC

panels.title: Copilot Engine
panels.description: Which reasoner produced the latest report and how long it took.

targets.rawSql: SELECT concat(reasoner, if(model != '', concat(' (', model, ')'), ''), ' · ', toString(latency_ms), ' ms') AS value FROM helios.rca_report WHERE agent_run_id = (SELECT agent_run_id FROM helios.agent_run ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 1) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Overall Quality Score
panels.description: Mean of all evaluator scores for the latest run (0–1).

targets.rawSql: WITH r AS (SELECT agent_run_id FROM helios.agent_run ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 1), latest AS (SELECT max(created_at) AS t FROM helios.eval_result WHERE agent_run_id IN (SELECT agent_run_id FROM r)) SELECT round(avg(score), 2) AS value FROM helios.eval_result WHERE agent_run_id IN (SELECT agent_run_id FROM r) AND created_at = (SELECT t FROM latest)

WITH r AS (SELECT agent_run_id FROM helios.agent_run ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 1), latest AS (SELECT max(created_at) AS t FROM helios.eval_result WHERE agent_run_id IN (SELECT agent_run_id FROM r)) SELECT concat(toString(countIf(passed = 1)), ' / ', toString(count())) AS value FROM helios.eval_result WHERE agent_run_id IN (SELECT agent_run_id FROM r) AND created_at = (SELECT t FROM latest)

panels.title: Evaluation Results (latest run)
panels.description: Code checks, LLM-as-judge faithfulness, and drift — the quality gate that decides whether RCA auto-triggers.

targets.rawSql: WITH r AS (SELECT agent_run_id FROM helios.agent_run ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 1), latest AS (SELECT max(created_at) AS t FROM helios.eval_result WHERE agent_run_id IN (SELECT agent_run_id FROM r)) SELECT evaluator AS "Evaluator", evaluator_kind AS "Kind", if(passed = 1, 'PASS', 'FAIL') AS "Result", score AS "Score", label AS "Label", reason AS "Reason" FROM helios.eval_result WHERE agent_run_id IN (SELECT agent_run_id FROM r) AND created_at = (SELECT t FROM latest) ORDER BY passed ASC, score ASC

WITH r AS (SELECT agent_run_id FROM helios.agent_run ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 1), latest AS (SELECT max(created_at) AS t FROM helios.eval_result WHERE agent_run_id IN (SELECT agent_run_id FROM r)) SELECT evaluator_kind AS "Kind", round(avg(score), 2) AS "Avg Score", count() AS "Checks" FROM helios.eval_result WHERE agent_run_id IN (SELECT agent_run_id FROM r) AND created_at = (SELECT t FROM latest) GROUP BY evaluator_kind ORDER BY "Avg Score" ASC
